attributes.description: Alerts when `go_goroutines > 2000`. Possible goroutine leak in Traefik.
attributes.name: [Traefik OTel] High goroutine count

investigation_guide.blob:
## Traefik high goroutine count

### What fired
`go_goroutines > 2000` during the window.

### Why it matters
Traefik uses one goroutine per active connection plus workers. Elevated counts usually mean connection leaks or a stuck plugin.

### Triage
1. Sample Go profile from Traefik admin endpoint.
2. Check plugin / middleware behaviour.

### Remediation
- Restart Traefik.
- File issue if reproducible.

### Tuning
- 2000 threshold; tune to baseline (typically 500-2000).
